English Translation of “ARBEIT” | The official Collins German-English Dictionary online. Over 100,000 English translations of German words and phrases. Present of German verb arbeiten The conjugation of arbeiten (work, be employed) in the present tense is: ich arbeite, du arbeitest, er arbeitet, wir arbeiten, ihr arbeitet, sie arbeiten. For this purpose, the endings -e, -est, -et, -en, -et, -en are appended to the stem arbeit. The endings in the 2nd and 3rd person singular and in the 2nd person plural are extended by "e", as the stem ends on English words for arbeit include work, labor, job, employment, paper, piece of work, travail, script, test and labour. Find more German words at wordhippo.com! When and how to use the "dative" case in a sentence. Discover why it is the "laziest" of all the cases in this free beginner German lesson. Declension of noun „Arbeiter“: in plural, genitive, all cases, with examples, definitions, translations, speech output and downloads. This idea is reflected in the German arm (poor). And also the word Arbeit used to means hard, tiring labor – the kind that serfs would have to do. The German erben, which is about inheriting, on the other hand ties in with the idea of having lost the father. Here’s an overview over the English relatives: robot (a slave like worker) orphan Deklination Substantiv Arbeit: im Plural, Genitiv, allen Kasus, mit Beispielen, Bedeutungen, Übersetzungen, Sprachausgabe und Downloads. Meaning of Arbeit The meaning of ARBEIT is: Arbeit is a word of the German language which means “work” or “labour”. It is also a surname, and may refer to: Arnold Arbeit (1911–1974), American artist and architect. Jochen Arbeit, German guitarist. Singular and Plural of Arbeit The plural of Arbeit is Arbeiten. The article, as well as the declination of the noun Arbeit in German, are presented in the form of a table with all forms of numbers and cases. Declension of German noun Arbeit with plural and article The declension of the noun Arbeit (work, employment) is in singular genitive Arbeit and in the plural nominative Arbeiten. Hier finden Sie Artikeltraining und Übungen zu Wortschatz und Grammatik! The article, as well as the declination of the noun Arbeiten in German, are presented in the form of a table with all forms of numbers and cases. Arbeit translate: work, job, task, job, work, work, test, work, job, labour, labor, spell, work, work, work, work. Learn more in the Cambridge German-English arbeit - declension in German: plural, endings in genitive, dative and other cases. Declension of noun „Job“: in plural, genitive, all cases, with examples, definitions, translations, speech output and downloads. Arbeit f (genitive Arbeit, plural Arbeiten) (uncountable, countable)[n 1] toil, regularly performed work, regularly pursued economic activity, labor, job, employment, occupation Synonyms: Beschäftigung, Beruf, (archaic) Werk, (if paid) Erwerb, (if paid) Erwerbstätigkeit, (if paid) Erwerbsarbeit Seine Arbeit macht ihm Spaß. ― He enjoys his work/job. Ich kann gerade nicht. Ich bin bei der Conjugation of German verb arbeiten The conjugation of the verb arbeiten (work, be employed) is regular. Basic forms are arbeitet, arbeitete and hat gearbeitet. The auxiliary verb of arbeiten is haben. Verb arbeiten can be used reflexivly. The flection is in Active and the use as Main. For a better understanding, countless examples of the verb arbeiten are available.
